title: Restore trudoc verify via Node in CI

source.subject: fix(ci): restore trudoc verify via Node, build runtime bridge for e2e

body:
CI runs trudoc verification under Node (not Bun stub) and builds the runtime bridge required by dependent e2e steps.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`0a173a6`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/0a173a6)
- **Subject:** fix(ci): restore trudoc verify via Node, build runtime bridge for e2e
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `ci-release`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-docs-reader-hardening`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **Docs reader hardening** (`v03-docs-reader-hardening`).
